name: 销售易CRM
description: 用自然语言查客户、推商机、盘线索、领公海、写跟进，一句话打通销售工作闭环。
description_zh: 用自然语言查客户、推商机、盘线索、领公海、写跟进，一句话打通销售工作闭环。
description_en: Query customers, advance opportunities, review leads, claim from the public pool, and log follow-ups in natural language—closing the sales workflow loop in a single sentence.
examples_zh: 我要去拜访XXX，帮我准备一下
把我名下超过 30 天没跟进的客户列出来
搜一下公海里制造业、上周新进的线索 Top 10
examples_en: I'm going to visit XXX, help me get prepared
List my customers with no follow-up in the past 30 days
Find the top 10 manufacturing leads added to the public pool last week
